category_sources: source_facts.description says small footprint implementation of Tcl; official Jim Tcl site describes an open-source small-footprint Tcl implementation.
display_name_sources: Official site title and documentation use Jim Tcl; source_facts.name is jimtcl.
docs_sources: Official Jim Tcl documentation page lists the user reference manual and documentation topics; official manual URL provides the Jim Tcl reference text.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/msteveb/jimtcl; repo returned null per instruction not to second-guess existing repo values.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official site describe Jim Tcl as a small-footprint Tcl implementation used for embedded scripting; source_facts.executables includes jimsh.
